title: Rachael Blackmore: A Grand Year
overview: The remarkable tale of Rachael Blackmore's rise to the pinnacle of horse racing and her historic year. Supported by a stellar cast of horse racing luminaries, A P McCoy, Ruby Walsh, and her family, Rachael tells her story in depth.
